modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the functionality of the File tab in Microsoft.

full_description_text: User was asking about the File tab in Microsoft. They wanted to know what actions it allows. The conversation was during a live call. There was some confusion about its features and options available.
short_description: Inquiry about the functionality of the File tab in Microsoft.
description: User was asking about the File tab in Microsoft. They wanted to know what actions it allows. The conversation was during a live call. There was some confusion about its features and options available.
